---
title: "Robert Pantatun"
---

## Robert Pantatun

**Dates:** (d.1910)

### Description

Melanesian missionary

### Biography

According to Blain\'s directory he was born in 1869, but this seems inconsistent with other evidence.  He was the brother of Fisher Pantatun.
See
http://anglicanhistory.org/nz/blain_directory/

Patteson married him to Emily Milerauwe.

### Letters

- Letter from November 24, 1869.
- Letter from Christmas Day [25 December], 1867.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
